span.p:
DTA on the books
(assess by jurisdiction)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Is there a CUMULATIVE LOSS in
recent years (typically 3-year)?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Can positive evidence of the SAME
OBJECTIVE weight overcome it?
(reversing DTLs of right character/timing,
signed backlog, viable tax-planning strategy,
carryback capacity)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Is realization of each DTA piece
MORE LIKELY THAN NOT (>50%)?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
RECORD FULL VALUATION ALLOWANCE
(the common outcome for cumulative-loss cos.)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Partial VA on the
unsupported portion
